summary: Verified variant selector race condition fix on /shop/collection/Bluestone. ALL 6 TESTS PASSED. The userClickedRef fix successfully prevents auto-switch useEffects from overriding user clicks.

minor.issue: Two 500 errors in console during page load (unrelated to variant selection, likely analytics/tracking endpoints)

critical_code_review_comments: FIX VERIFIED: userClickedRef at line 77 correctly tracks user clicks
Lines 525-528: Auto-switch color useEffect correctly skips when userClickedRef.current === 'color'
Lines 538-541: Auto-switch finish useEffect correctly skips when userClickedRef.current === 'finish'
Lines 1475 and 1524: Click handlers correctly set userClickedRef.current before state change
test_credentials: No auth needed for shop pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Variant selector race condition fix VERIFIED. The userClickedRef pattern successfully prevents auto-switch useEffects from overriding user clicks. All color/finish combinations work correctly without 'Collection Not Found' errors.

1_color_to_finish_auto_switch_beige.details: From Grey+Polished, clicked Beige. Finish auto-switched to Matt, Beige preserved.

2_color_to_finish_auto_switch_white.details: From Grey+Polished, clicked White. Finish auto-switched to Matt, size auto-adjusted to 30x60cm, White preserved.

3_finish_to_color_auto_switch.details: From Beige+Matt, clicked Polished. Color auto-switched to Grey, Polished preserved.

4_same_finish_color_switch.details: From Grey+Polished, clicked Matt. Grey preserved, finish changed to Matt.

5_no_revert.details: All user clicks preserved after auto-switch: Beige preserved, Polished preserved, White preserved.

6_no_collection_not_found.details: All 6 color/finish combinations tested without 'Collection Not Found' errors.

fix_verification.fix_description: Added userClickedRef to prevent race condition between auto-switch useEffects
fix_verification.mechanism: When user clicks COLOR, userClickedRef.current='color' is set BEFORE setSelectedColor. The 'auto-switch color' useEffect at lines 525-528 checks this ref and SKIPS if user clicked color. Similarly for finish clicks.
fix_verification.result: User's clicked value is now preserved and not overwritten by auto-switch logic
